title: Replace match-with-early-return with let-else in Session capability methods
description: Three methods in jmap.rs (chat_capability, websocket_capability, chat_push_capability) use the pre-let-else idiom: match Some(x) => x, None => return Ok(None). Rust 1.65+ let-else is the current idiomatic form and is more readable. Fix: replace the 6 match arms (2 per method) with let-else at jmap.rs:379-390, 408-416, 439-448. Mechanical change, no behaviour difference.
notes: Epic: jmap-chat-tui-4pp (jmap-chat API idiomaticity: review findings)
